summary: The board is fixed at 8 by 8, there are at most four pieces and at most one queen, and every move lasts at most seven seconds. The complete legal domain therefore has a fixed finite work bound and cannot support honest asymptotic runtime scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: At most one queen has at most 28 choices, and each of the other three pieces has at most the rook maximum of 15 choices

replacement_checks.evidence: At most 28 * 15^3 = 94500 combinations are simulated, each for at most eight integer times and four pieces.
Authored cases cover every piece type, staying and movement interactions, adjacent swaps, intersecting trajectories, opposite corners, and three simultaneous pieces.
